# Research Ingestion Pipeline

## Inputs

```text
customer reviews
sales calls
support tickets
competitor pages
search queries
ad libraries
communities
analytics
survey responses
```

## Outputs

```text
buyer_language.md
objection_bank.md
proof_gap_map.md
competitor_claims.md
demand_signals.md
```

## Agent rule

Research must be translated into tactics.

Do not let research become a pile of notes.
